_metadata.description: Weight calibration rationale for compliance rules
_metadata.note: Weights are calibrated based on industry best practices and audit importance, not arbitrary values.

weight_scale.7-8: High impact - security and audit-critical controls
weight_scale.9-10: Critical impact - blocking controls for compliance

Branch protection enabled.rationale: Highest weight because unrestricted branch access bypasses all code review controls. This is a foundational access control that auditors check first.
Branch protection enabled.soc2_relevance: CC6.1 - Logical access is the cornerstone of change management controls
Branch protection enabled.audit_risk: Direct commits to production can introduce vulnerabilities or malicious code

Dependabot configured.rationale: High weight because outdated dependencies are a leading source of CVEs. Automated updates demonstrate proactive vulnerability management.
Dependabot configured.soc2_relevance: CC8.1 - Change management requires controlled updates
Dependabot configured.audit_risk: Known vulnerabilities in dependencies can fail penetration tests

CODEOWNERS file exists.rationale: High weight because code ownership defines accountability. Auditors look for clear responsibility assignment.
CODEOWNERS file exists.soc2_relevance: CC5.2 - Assignment of responsibility for security functions
CODEOWNERS file exists.audit_risk: Unclear ownership leads to missed reviews and responsibility gaps

SECURITY.md file exists.rationale: Medium-high weight for incident response documentation. Required for responsible disclosure compliance.
SECURITY.md file exists.soc2_relevance: CC7.2 - Security incident response requires documented procedures
SECURITY.md file exists.audit_risk: Missing disclosure policy shows lack of incident preparedness

README.md exists.rationale: Medium weight for documentation. Important for onboarding but not directly security-impacting.
README.md exists.soc2_relevance: CC5.1 - Risk assessment includes documentation completeness

LICENSE file exists.rationale: Medium weight for legal compliance. Important for open-source license tracking.
LICENSE file exists.soc2_relevance: CC9.1 - Third-party risk management includes license compliance
LICENSE file exists.audit_risk: Can cause legal issues if using unlicensed or incompatibly licensed code

.gitignore configured.rationale: Medium weight for secret prevention. Helps avoid accidental credential commits.
.gitignore configured.soc2_relevance: CC6.6 - Boundary protection includes secret management
.gitignore configured.audit_risk: Missing gitignore increases likelihood of sensitive file leaks

customization_policy.built_in_standards: Weights are read-only for built-in standards to ensure consistency
customization_policy.custom_standards: Organizations can define custom weights based on their risk profile
customization_policy.recommendation: Adjust weights based on your specific audit requirements and risk tolerance
